prompt: Create a cinematic ultra-detailed fantasy diorama scene in a wide 16:9 frame: a miniature garden pathway on a glossy black curved base, covered with lush moss, tiny grasses, stones, and warm golden light. At the right-center stands an elegant anime-inspired young woman, full body, turned slightly away but looking back toward the viewer with a calm confident expression. She has long wavy golden-blonde hair, delicate face, and wears a fitted black Victorian-style coat and trousers with ornate gold embroidery, lace cuffs, high-heeled black boots, and a refined fantasy noble silhouette. A translucent glowing golden stream or road winds from the foreground left through the garden toward the background, sparkling like liquid glass filled with tiny lights. Include exactly seven small fluffy yellow chicks scattered along the path and moss: one in the front-left foreground, one near the lower center, one at lower right, one mid-right, one near the character’s feet, one center-left by the glowing path, and one behind the character near the rocks. In the background, add a luminous crescent moon sculpture and delicate bridge or gazebo-like ornament made of warm fairy lights, plus large looping arcs and tree-like crystal branches formed from transparent golden glass and bokeh light. Use shallow depth of field with blurred foreground crystal branches on the left and sparkling circular bokeh behind, dramatic macro photography feeling, warm amber-gold color grading, high realism mixed with anime figurine aesthetics, intricate materials, glowing particles, volumetric light, and no text or watermark.
